settings.title: Account Portal
settings.subtitle: Manage your digital footprint and fine-tune your family tree experience.

profile.title: Identity Profile
profile.desc: Set your public identity and profile credentials.
profile.name: Full Display Name
profile.bioPlaceholder: Brief description for your family profile...

status.title: Account Status
status.passwordMismatch: Passwords do not match or are empty.

appearance.title: Visual Styles
appearance.desc: Personalize the interface for your environment.
appearance.syncDesc: Let your operating system determine when to switch between Solaris and Midnight modes.

notifications.title: Alert Gateway
notifications.desc: Configure how you want to be notified of family events.

email.label: Email Broadcasts
email.desc: Weekly digests and critical tree modifications

marketing.label: Grid Updates
marketing.desc: New system features and development roadmap news

security.title: Shield Protocols
security.desc: Manage your access keys and security parameters.

proTip.title: Pro-Tip
proTip.body: Using a passphrase instead of a single word makes your family data significantly harder to compromise.

preferences.title: Regional Config
preferences.autoScanDesc: The system will attempt to derive your location and time parameters from your active browser session.

termination.title: Nuclear Option
termination.sectionDesc: This will purge all your family trees, memories, and personal metadata from our servers. This action is definitive.
termination.confirmMessage: WARNING: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action is irreversible. Proceed?
termination.confirmPrompt: To confirm deletion, please type 'DELETE' below:

dashboard.subtitle: Manage your family trees, permissions, and historical records.

noTrees.title: No family trees yet
noTrees.subtitle: Start documenting your family history by creating your first tree.

memories.title: Family Wall
memories.subtitle: A shared space for milestones, stories, and photos. Preserve your heritage together.

noMemories.title: No memories found
noMemories.searchSubtitle: Try adjusting your filters or search terms.
noMemories.emptySubtitle: Be the first to capture a family memory in this tree!

createPersonModal.title: Add New Relative
createPersonModal.subtitle: Create a new profile in your family tree

mergeModal.title: Merge Profile
mergeModal.subtitle: Consolidate duplicate family members
mergeModal.sourceDesc: This profile will be marked as merged and its relationships will move to the target.
mergeModal.warningBody: You are about to merge {source} into {target}.
mergeModal.warningOne: All existing relationships from the source will be transferred.
mergeModal.warningThree: The source profile will be marked as "merged" and hidden from the tree.
mergeModal.warningFour: This action is recorded in the audit history.

memoryModal.title: Memory Title
memoryModal.milestonePlaceholder: Share some details about this milestone...

profileDrawer.deleteReason: Why should this profile be removed? (Optional)
profileDrawer.adminClaimNote: As an administrator, this profile will be instantly linked to your account.
profileDrawer.userClaimNote: Establishing a link to this profile requires administrative approval.

status.claimFailed: Failed to submit claim request. Please try again.

personPage.noEditPermission: You do not have permission to edit this profile
personPage.permanentDeleteNote: This action cannot be undone. All relationships and data for this profile will be purged.
personPage.removalNote: A request will be sent to tree administrators for review.
personPage.deleteReason: Optional: Why should this profile be removed?
personPage.noMergePermission: You do not have permission to initiate profile merges

dataPrivacy.title: Data Privacy
dataPrivacy.desc: This profile's visibility is managed by tree administrators. Sensitive data is only shown based on the permissions granted.

claimNote.admin: As an administrator, your claim will be automatically approved.
claimNote.user: This will establish you as the representative of this profile. Admin approval required.

adminSettings.title: System Settings
adminSettings.subtitle: Configure system options and preferences
adminSettings.requireEmailVerification: Require email verification for new users
adminSettings.requireAdminApproval: Require admin approval for user accounts
adminSettings.allowSelfDelete: Allow users to delete their own accounts

empty.title: Build Your Family Tree
empty.subtitle: Add your first family member and connect them to start visualizing your history.

noNotifications.title: No notifications yet
noNotifications.subtitle: You're all caught up! Check back later.

layout.noPermission: You don't have permission to view this page.

accessRequests.title: Access Requests
accessRequests.subtitle: Manage who can join your family tree and their permission levels. New members and role upgrades appear here.

selectTree.desc: Manage members for the selected workspace
selectTree.title: Select Tree

noRequests.title: No pending requests
noRequests.subtitle: When new family members ask to join your tree, they will show up here for approval.

invitations.title: Tree Invitations
invitations.subtitle: Create secure links to invite your relatives. Each link is valid for 7 days and requires your approval before they can join.

targetTree.desc: Select which family workspace you want to create secure invitation links for.
targetTree.title: Target Family Tree

invitations.selectToGenerate: Select a tree above to generate invitations.
invitations.selectToView: Select a tree above to view active invitations.

desc.member: Can add people and propose relationships.
desc.viewer: Read-only access to the family tree.
desc.admin: Full control over tree and invitations.

invitations.noLinks: No active invitation links for this tree. Generate one above.

management.title: Tree Management
management.subtitle: Review and verify changes proposed by tree members.

sourceWorkspace.desc: Select the family tree you want to review proposals for.
sourceWorkspace.title: Source Workspace

management.deletionWarning: Approval will permanently remove this profile and all its connections.
management.noProposals: There are no pending {type} proposals to review for this tree.

claims.title: Profile Claims
claims.subtitle: Review requests from users who want to link their account to an existing profile in the family tree.

selectTree.desc: Review claims for the selected workspace
selectTree.title: Select Tree

noRequests.title: No pending claim requests
noRequests.subtitle: When users request to claim a profile in your tree, they will show up here for verification.

access_request_approved.title: Welcome to the Family Tree
access_request_approved.message: Your request to join as a {role} has been approved.

access_request_rejected.title: Access Request Rejected
access_request_rejected.message: Your request to join as a {role} was rejected.

access_request_pending.upgrade_message: A user is requesting to upgrade from {currentRole} to {requestedRole}
access_request_pending.join_message: A new user is requesting to join your family tree as a {role}

deletion_proposal_pending.title: Deletion Request
deletion_proposal_pending.message: A deletion has been proposed for {name}

deletion_approved.title: Deletion Request Approved
deletion_approved.message: Your request to delete a profile has been approved.

deletion_rejected.title: Deletion Request Rejected
deletion_rejected.message: Your request to delete a profile was rejected.

claim_request_pending.title: Profile Claim Request
claim_request_pending.message: A user is requesting to claim the profile of {name}

claim_approved.title: Profile Claim Approved
claim_approved.message: Your request to claim a profile has been approved.

claim_rejected.title: Profile Claim Rejected
claim_rejected.message: Your request to claim a profile was rejected.

merge_proposal_pending.title: Merge Request
merge_proposal_pending.message: A merge has been proposed for {source} into {target}

merge_approved.title: Merge Request Approved
merge_approved.message: Your request to merge profiles has been approved.

merge_rejected.title: Merge Request Rejected
merge_rejected.message: Your request to merge profiles was rejected.

permission_granted.title: Permissions Granted
permission_granted.message: You have been granted {permissionType} rights on a profile.

relationship_pending.title: New Relationship Proposal
relationship_pending.message: A new {relationshipType} relationship has been proposed in your tree.

relationship_approved.title: Relationship Approved
relationship_approved.message: Your proposed {relationshipType} relationship has been approved.

hero.subtitle: A minimalist, secure platform to build your family tree, share historical records, and stay connected with your roots.

collaborative.title: Collaborative Building
collaborative.desc: Invite family members to contribute stories, photos, and records to build a comprehensive history together.

sharing.title: Secure Sharing
sharing.desc: Granular permission controls ensure your family data is only visible to those you explicitly authorize.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.desc: Industry-standard encryption protects your sensitive records. Your data belongs to you, always.

footer.copyright: © 2026 FamiLink. All rights reserved. Built for legacy.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your family tree

error.noSession: Login succeeded but session was not created.

join.subtitle: To join a private family tree
join.viewDesc: You will be able to view the tree and its members.
join.memberDesc: You can also add new family members.
join.privacyNotice: By accepting, you agree to follow the privacy guidelines set by the tree administrators.

claim.success: You now have edit access to this family member!
claim.invalid: This claim link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

newTree.title: Name your Family Tree
newTree.subtitle: Every family has a story. Give yours a beautiful starting point. You can change this later.
newTree.proTipBody: Most families use their last name, like "The Andersons" or "Smith Ancestry". You can invite your relatives to collaborate once the tree is created.

notFound.title: Lost in the Family Tree
notFound.subtitle: The page you're looking for has moved out of the neighborhood or never existed in this branch.

error.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

error.title: Something went wrong
error.subtitle: An unexpected error occurred while fetching data.

errorBoundary.title: Oops! Something went wrong
errorBoundary.subtitle: The application encountered an unexpected error. Please try again.

accessControl.title: Access Control
accessControl.desc: Granting explicit permissions allows specific family members to manage this profile without giving them Admin rights to the entire tree.

invitationCard.title: You're invited!
invitationCard.subtitle: Join the family tree

role.adminDesc: Full access to manage the family tree
role.memberDesc: Can create and edit family relationships
role.viewerDesc: Read-only access to view the family tree

invitationCard.noAccount: Don't have an account? You'll be asked to create one on the next step.

proposalModal.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
proposalModal.selfWarning: A person cannot have a relationship with themselves.

treeActionModal.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete "{treeName}"? This action cannot be undone. Please type the name of the tree to confirm
treeActionModal.confirmRename: Enter a new name for your tree "{treeName}"

confirmDelete.title: Delete Memory?
confirmDelete.desc: This memory will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
